docket_entries.description: ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT SZANTO PETER
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY TAVERNIER LANCE AS TO DEFENDANT SZANTO PETER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-08-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SZANTO PETER
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO FRITZ SCHOLTEN TO APPEAR/BRING WATCH(SUBJ).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAVERNIER LANCE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SZANTO PETER $2,224.00 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,232.00, IF ROLEX WATCH IN QUESTION RET'D TO PLTF W/30 DAYS OF JUDGMENT, JUDGMENT DEEMED SATISFIED STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
